display_text: Circlet of the Flayed Twins, Tier Neutral: Passive ability Bloodbath converts a percentage of damage taken over the last 10 seconds into health regeneration, up to a maximum amount. Provides survivability for heroes that take consistent damage but lack innate sustain. Stats: Damage Converted: 10%, Time Window: 10s, Max Regen: 12 HP/s.
